name: podpilot
title: PodPilot
description: PodPilot brings real Kubernetes operations to Raycast. Quickly browse contexts and namespaces, inspect pods and deployments, stream logs, trigger rollouts, and jump into shells — all powered by your existing kubectl configuration.
author: brian_keetman

commands.name: browse-cluster
commands.title: Browse Cluster
commands.subtitle: Pods, Deployments, Services & more
commands.description: Navigate Kubernetes contexts and namespaces to inspect cluster resources.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
